title: Mid-Level Frontend Developer at Qualcomm India

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Frontend Developer at Qualcomm India
jsonLd.description:
Qualcomm India, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Frontend Developer for our Raipur operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Qualcomm India:
Qualcomm India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Kubernetes

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Life and accident insurance
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Raipur, Chhattisgarh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Qualcomm India!
